description_long: This object consists of a rectangular stone or concrete pedestal with a sword prominently displayed on top. The pedestal is set on a series of three stepped, polygonal stone platforms, each with a weathered, tiled appearance. The sword features a straight, double-edged blade and a dark, ornate handle with a blue pommel and crossguard, suggesting ceremonial or decorative use. The platforms and pedestal are textured to resemble aged stone, with visible seams and surface irregularities. The sword is centrally positioned, drawing attention as the focal point of the display. The overall scene evokes the impression of a monument or shrine, possibly commemorative in nature.
description: A ceremonial sword rests atop a rectangular stone pedestal, which is set on three stepped, weathered stone platforms. The sword features a dark, ornate handle and is the centerpiece of this monument-like display.
description_view_0: The sword is seen in profile, lying horizontally atop the rectangular pedestal, with the layered stone platforms clearly visible.
description_view_1: The sword is viewed from the handle end, showing the crossguard and pommel, with the platforms receding in perspective.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the sword is seen in profile from the opposite side, with the platforms and pedestal visible.
description_view_3: The sword is viewed from the blade tip, emphasizing the handle and crossguard, with the platforms extending outward.
attribute_handle_design: dark, straight, with blue pommel and crossguard, possibly wrapped or decorated
